title: On the discrete to continuous condensing aggregation equation: A weak convergence approach
summary: In this article, we study the passage of limits from discrete to continuous condensing aggregation equation which comprises of Oort-Hulst-Safronov (OHS) equation together with inverse aggregation process. We establish the relation between discrete and continuous condensing aggregation equations in its most generalized form, where kinetic-kernels with respect to OHS and inverse aggregation equations are not always equal. Convergence criterion is proved under suitable a priori estimates by approximating the continuous equation through a sequence of discrete equations, which subsequently converges towards the solution of the continuous equation by weak compactness principles. Existence of solution to the discrete model and uniform bounds on different order moments over finite time under particular conditions on kinetic-kernels are investigated. We analyze long-time dynamics and blowup of the solution leading to mass-loss or gelation for specific kernels. Three numerical experiments show the accuracy and convergence of approximated solutions to the exact solution of the continuous equation when $\varepsilon$ approaches zero.

AI.tldr: 建立了离散与连续凝聚聚集方程之间的极限关系，证明了在适当条件下的收敛准则，并分析了长时间动力学和爆破现象。
AI.motivation: 研究离散到连续凝聚聚集方程的极限过程，该方程包含Oort-Hulst-Safronov方程和逆聚集过程，旨在建立离散与连续模型之间的数学联系。
AI.techniques: 通过离散方程序列逼近连续方程，利用弱紧性原理证明收敛性，建立先验估计和一致有界性，分析矩估计和长时间动力学。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了离散到连续凝聚聚集方程的收敛准则，建立了离散模型解的存在性，给出了特定条件下矩的一致有界性，分析了特定核下的长时间动力学和爆破现象。
AI.significance: 为凝聚聚集过程的离散与连续模型建立了严格的数学联系，提供了数值逼近的理论基础，对理解聚集过程中的质量损失和凝胶化现象有重要意义。

title: Inverse coefficient problem for a fully fractional diffusion equation with nonlinear and source nonlocal initial condition
summary:
In this work, we consider an inverse problem of determining a time dependent coefficient in a fully fractional diffusion equation with a nonlinear source term. The nonlocal initial-boundary value problem refers to the forward model: the fractional diffusion equation equipped with a nonlocal initial condition and homogeneous Dirichlet boundary conditions. We first establish the existence and uniqueness of the mild solution to this nonlocal initial boundary value problem, together with the corresponding regularity properties of the solution. These results are obtained via the Fourier method, tools from fractional calculus, and key properties of the Mittag-Leffler function.
  Subsequently, by applying a fixed-point argument in suitable Sobolev spaces, we prove a theorem on the local existence and uniqueness of the solution to the inverse problem. In this way, we establish the well-posedness of the problem solution.

AI.tldr: 建立了带非线性源项的全分数阶扩散方程中时间依赖系数的反问题解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究带非线性源项的全分数阶扩散方程中时间依赖系数的反问题，这类问题在非局部扩散过程建模中具有重要应用，需要处理非局部初始条件和分数阶导数带来的数学挑战。
AI.techniques: 傅里叶方法、分数阶微积分工具、Mittag-Leffler函数的关键性质、Sobolev空间中的不动点论证
AI.main_theorems: 1) 非局部初边值问题温和解的存在唯一性及正则性；2) 反问题解的局部存在唯一性定理；3) 问题解的适定性
AI.significance: 为分数阶扩散方程反问题理论提供了严格数学基础，扩展了分数阶PDE反问题研究框架，对非局部扩散过程的参数识别具有理论指导意义。

title: On Schauder Estimates for Fractional Hamilton-Jacobi Equations
summary: We prove Schauder estimates $\unicode{x2013}$ optimal regularity estimates in Hölder spaces $\unicode{x2013}$ and well-posedness results for mild and classical solutions of fractional Hamilton-Jacobi equations with subcritical nonlocal diffusions in $\mathbb{R}^d$. Due to an interplay between the regularity of the initial data and the growth of the Hamiltonian in the gradient, we focus on two canonical cases: (i) Lipschitz initial data and general Hamiltonians that are Hölder in space and merely locally Lipschitz in the gradient, and (ii) Hölder initial data and Hamiltonians that are Hölder in space and locally Lipschitz with power growth in the gradient. We compute explicit blow-up rates for $C^1$ and higher order Hölder norms as $t \to 0$. The results include short time and long time existence for mild solutions, optimal regularity in Hölder spaces and corresponding Schauder a priori estimates, and that smooth mild solutions are classical solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了分数阶Hamilton-Jacobi方程在亚临界非局部扩散下的Schauder估计和适定性结果
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Hamilton-Jacobi方程在亚临界非局部扩散下的正则性理论，特别关注初始数据正则性与Hamiltonian梯度增长之间的相互作用
AI.techniques: 使用Schauder估计、Hölder空间理论、非局部算子分析、爆破率计算、先验估计和适定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了两种典型情况下的最优正则性估计：1) Lipschitz初值与一般Hamiltonian；2) Hölder初值与幂增长Hamiltonian，包括短时和长时存在性、最优Hölder正则性和Schauder先验估计
AI.significance: 建立了分数阶Hamilton-Jacobi方程的正则性理论框架，为研究非局部扩散方程提供了重要工具，在最优控制、随机过程和金融数学中有应用

title: Non-density of nodal lines in the clamped plate problem
summary: We show that, in contrast to the case of Laplace eigenfunctions, the nodal set of high energy eigenfunctions of the clamped plate problem is not necessarily dense, and can in fact exhibit macroscopic "nodal voids". Specifically, we show that there are small deformations of the unit disk admitting a clamped plate eigenfunction of arbitrarily high frequency that does not vanish in a disk of radius 0.44.

AI.tldr: 证明了夹紧板问题的高能特征函数的节点集不一定稠密，可以存在宏观的"节点空洞"
AI.motivation: 研究夹紧板问题（clamped plate problem）的特征函数节点集性质，与拉普拉斯特征函数进行对比。拉普拉斯特征函数的节点集在高频时总是稠密的，但夹紧板问题是否具有相同性质是未知的
AI.techniques: 通过对单位圆盘进行小变形构造反例，使用特征函数分析技术，可能涉及变分方法、渐近分析和扰动理论
AI.main_theorems: 存在单位圆盘的小变形，使得夹紧板问题存在任意高频的特征函数，该函数在半径为0.44的圆盘内不消失（即存在节点空洞）
AI.significance: 揭示了夹紧板问题与拉普拉斯特征函数在节点集性质上的根本差异，为高阶椭圆算子的节点集理论提供了新的反例，对理解高阶偏微分方程的特征函数结构有重要意义

title: Free Boundary Problem for inhomogeneous Navier-Stokes equations
summary:
We study free boundary problems for incompressible inhomogeneous flows governed by the Navier--Stokes equations, focusing on the regularity and global-in-time well-posedness of solutions in critical functional frameworks for small initial data.
  We introduce a novel analytical framework for free boundary problems formulated as perturbations of the half-space. Our approach relies on the natural Lagrangian change of coordinates and a detailed analysis of the linearized problem (the Stokes system) in the maximal regularity regime, formulated in the Lebesgue spaces $L_p(0,T; L_q)$, including time-weighted variants. The main difficulty lies in the treatment of boundary terms, for which we apply a new technique based on complex interpolation to control nonlinear terms in fractional Sobolev spaces. This strategy also allows us to handle the case of variable density, which is not easily addressed by approaches based on Besov spaces.
  Using this framework and real interpolation techniques, we construct also solutions in the Lorentz class $L_{p,1}(0,T; L_q)$ in time. The method further enables a rigorous study of the stability of equilibrium configurations. In particular, we resolve the problem in two spatial dimensions, where the interplay between geometry and regularity is especially subtle. Beyond these specific applications, the proposed approach provides a powerful tool for broader classes of nonlinear PDEs and further developments in maximal regularity theory.

AI.tldr: 提出了处理Navier-Stokes方程自由边界问题的新分析框架，通过Lagrangian坐标变换和复插值技术解决边界项处理难题
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩非均匀流的自由边界问题，关注临界函数框架下小初值解的正则性和全局适定性，特别是处理半空间扰动和变密度情况的困难
AI.techniques: 采用自然Lagrangian坐标变换，在最大正则性框架下分析线性化Stokes系统，使用复插值技术控制分数Sobolev空间中的非线性边界项，结合实插值构造Lorentz类解
AI.main_theorems: 建立了自由边界Navier-Stokes方程在临界函数框架下的全局适定性理论，解决了二维空间中几何与正则性的微妙相互作用问题，证明了平衡构型的稳定性
AI.significance: 为自由边界问题提供了强大的分析工具，克服了Besov空间方法处理变密度的困难，对最大正则性理论发展和更广泛的非线性PDE研究有重要推动作用

title: Regularity for fully nonlinear degenerate parabolic equations with strong absorption

AI.tldr: 建立了完全非线性退化抛物方程死核问题的尖锐正则性估计和自由边界几何性质
AI.motivation: 研究具有强吸收项的完全非线性退化抛物方程的死核问题，这类方程在相变、多孔介质流等领域有重要应用，需要理解解的正则性和自由边界性质
AI.techniques: 使用粘性解理论、比较原理、紧性方法、尺度分析、非退化性和均匀正密度估计，以及新的L^δ平均估计和梯度衰减性质
AI.main_theorems: 建立了自由边界附近的尖锐抛物C^α正则性估计（α>1+1/(1+p)）、解的非退化性和均匀正密度性质、整体解的Liouville型定理和梯度界，以及完全非线性奇异椭圆方程的L^δ平均估计
AI.significance: 将da Silva等人的结果推广到退化情形，建立了抛物类比，为完全非线性退化抛物方程的自由边界问题提供了系统理论框架，比较原理和紧性结果为后续研究提供了关键工具

title: Hydrodynamic limit of the Vlasov-Poisson-Fokker-Planck system in low-field regime
summary: In this paper, we study the hydrodynamic limit of the scaled Vlasov-Poisson-Fokker-Planck (VPFP) system in the low-field regime. By employing the moment method, we formally derive the corresponding Drift-Diffusion-Poisson (DDP) system. Furthermore, we rigorously justify the pointwise convergence from the VPFP system to the DDP system through delicate high-order energy estimates based on the Macro-Micro decomposition. The main difficulty lies in controlling the nonlinear coupling between the kinetic and electrostatic fields and establishing uniform bounds with respect to the scaling parameter. These challenges are overcome by developing refined high-order energy methods that yield uniform energy estimates and ensure the global well-posedness of smooth solutions, without relying on any a priori assumptions for the limiting DDP system.

AI.tldr: 通过高阶能量估计和宏观-微观分解，严格证明了低场区域尺度化Vlasov-Poisson-Fokker-Planck系统到Drift-Diffusion-Poisson系统的点态收敛。
AI.motivation: 研究尺度化Vlasov-Poisson-Fokker-Planck系统在低场区域的水动力学极限，建立从动理学模型到流体力学模型的严格数学联系。
AI.techniques: 矩方法、宏观-微观分解、高阶能量估计、一致性能量界分析、非线性耦合控制。
AI.main_theorems: 严格证明了VPFP系统到DDP系统的点态收敛，建立了全局光滑解的存在性和一致性能量估计，无需对极限DDP系统作先验假设。
AI.significance: 为动理学方程到流体力学方程的极限过程提供了严格数学基础，发展了处理非线性耦合和高阶能量估计的新方法，对等离子体物理和半导体器件模拟有重要应用价值。

title: Sharp Regularizing Effect of the Cauchy Problem for the Inhomogeneous Non-Cutoff Kac Equation
summary: In this work, we study the spatially inhomogeneous Kac equation with a non-cutoff cross section in a setting close to equilibrium. We prove that the solution to the Cauchy problem exhibits a sharp Gevrey-Gelfand-Shilov smoothing effect with an optimal radius. We employ a well-chosen exponential-type Fourier multiplier to establish the smoothing effect for position and velocity variables.

AI.tldr: 证明了非截断Kac方程在接近平衡态时具有最优半径的Gevrey-Gelfand-Shilov光滑化效应
AI.motivation: 研究空间非均匀Kac方程在非截断碰撞截面下的正则性行为，特别是在接近平衡态的情况下，探索解的光滑化效应
AI.techniques: 采用精心选择的指数型Fourier乘子方法，同时处理位置和速度变量的光滑化效应
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Cauchy问题的解具有尖锐的Gevrey-Gelfand-Shilov光滑化效应，且获得了最优的光滑半径
AI.significance: 为非截断碰撞算子的正则性理论提供了重要进展，揭示了Kac方程解在接近平衡态时的精细光滑性质

title: A Class of Non-linear Anisotropic Elliptic problems with Unbounded Coefficients and Singular Quadratic Lower Order Terms

AI.tldr: 研究具有奇异低阶项和梯度自然增长的各向异性椭圆方程的存在性和正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究各向异性椭圆方程，其低阶项具有奇异性且随梯度自然增长，同时系数无界，这类问题在数学物理中有重要应用但分析困难
AI.techniques: 使用各向异性Sobolev空间理论、逼近方法、正则化技术、变分原理，以及处理奇异项和梯度增长项的特殊技巧
AI.main_theorems: 建立了弱解的存在性和正则性结果，这些结果依赖于参数q和θ的取值，特别是奇异项指数θ和梯度增长指数q的关系
AI.significance: 扩展了各向异性椭圆方程理论，为处理具有奇异低阶项和梯度自然增长的问题提供了新的分析框架，对非线性偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Global Leray-Schauder continuation for Fredholm operators
summary: This paper ascertains the global behavior of the forward and backward branches of solutions provided by the Leray-Schauder continuation theorem for orientable $\mathcal{C}^1$ Fredholm maps, as developed by the authors in [54]. Under properness on bounded sets and a nonzero local index at the given base solution, each branch satisfies the following alternative: either it is unbounded, or it reaches the boundary of the domain, or it accumulates at a different solution on the base parameter level. When the component is bounded and stays in the interior, there is a degree balance on the base slice entailing a vanishing sum of local indices and, in particular, the existence of an even number of non-degenerate contact points. For real-analytic maps we construct locally injective parameterizations that exhibit blow-up, approach to the boundary, or return to the base level. An application to a quasilinear boundary value problem driven by the mean-curvature and Minkowski operators illustrates the global results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Leray-Schauder延拓定理产生的解分支的全局行为，建立了分支的三种可能结局，并对实解析映射构造了局部单射参数化。
AI.motivation: 研究Leray-Schauder延拓定理产生的解分支的全局行为，理解非线性方程解集的整体结构，特别是分支的极限行为。
AI.techniques: 使用Leray-Schauder延拓理论、Fredholm映射理论、局部指数理论、实解析映射的参数化方法，以及度平衡论证。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了分支的三种结局：无界、到达边界、或在基参数水平上累积到不同解；对有界且在内部分支，证明了基切片上的度平衡和偶数个非退化接触点存在性；对实解析映射构造了局部单射参数化。
AI.significance: 深化了对非线性方程解集全局结构的理解，为研究解分支的极限行为提供了系统框架，在拟线性边值问题中有具体应用。

title: Scattering from a random thin coating of nanoparticles: the Dirichlet case
summary: We study the time-harmonic scattering by a heterogeneous object covered with a thin layer of randomly distributed sound-soft nanoparticles. The size of the particles, their distance between each other and the layer's thickness are all of the same order but small compared to the wavelength of the incident wave. Solving the Helmholtz equation in this context can be very costly and the simulation depends on the given distribution of particles. To circumvent this, we propose, via a multi-scale asymptotic expansion of the solution, an effective model where the layer of particles is replaced by an equivalent boundary condition. The coefficients that appear in this equivalent boundary condition depend on the solutions to corrector problems of Laplace type defined on unbounded random domains. Under the assumption that the particles are distributed given a stationary and mixing random point process, we prove that those problems admit a unique solution in the proper space. We then establish quantitative error estimates for the effec tive model and present numerical simulations that illustrate our theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用等效边界条件替代随机纳米粒子薄层的有效模型，并建立了定量误差估计
AI.motivation: 研究时谐波在覆盖随机分布声软纳米粒子薄层的异质物体上的散射问题，粒子尺寸、间距和层厚均远小于波长，直接求解Helmholtz方程计算成本高且依赖于具体粒子分布
AI.techniques: 多尺度渐近展开、等效边界条件方法、无界随机域上的校正子问题求解、平稳混合随机点过程理论、定量误差估计
AI.main_theorems: 在平稳混合随机点过程假设下，证明了校正子问题在适当空间中存在唯一解；建立了有效模型与原始模型之间的定量误差估计
AI.significance: 为含随机纳米粒子层的波散射问题提供了高效计算框架，显著降低计算成本，对复合材料、声学超材料等领域有重要应用价值

title: Stability of $n$-soliton solutions for the Intermediate Long Wave equation
summary: In this work, we focus on the stability of $n$-soliton solutions ($n\in \mathbb{N}, n\geq 1$) to the completely integrable intermediate long wave equation (ILW), which models long internal gravity waves in a stratified fluid of finite depth. We show that the $n$-soliton solutions of the ILW equation form non-isolated constrained minimizers of a variational problem associated with a non-local elliptic equation. To establish this result, we construct a suitable Lyapunov functional and utilize the inverse scattering transform to relate the infinite sequence of conservation laws to the scattering data. Furthermore, we employ the recursion operator derived from the bi-Hamiltonian structure to optimize our analysis. Our analysis demonstrates that the $n$-soliton solutions of the ILW equation are dynamically stable in the space $H^{\frac{n}{2}}(\mathbb{R})$ ($n\in \mathbb{N}, n\geq 1$). Additionally, we establish the orbital stability of double soliton solutions in $H^1(\mathbb{R})$.

AI.tldr: 证明了中间长波方程n-孤子解在H^{n/2}空间中的动态稳定性以及双孤子解在H^1空间中的轨道稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究完全可积的中间长波方程(ILW)中n-孤子解的稳定性问题，该方程模拟有限深度分层流体中的长内重力波
AI.techniques: 构造Lyapunov泛函，利用逆散射变换将无穷守恒律与散射数据关联，运用双哈密顿结构导出的递归算子进行优化分析
AI.main_theorems: ILW方程的n-孤子解是非局部椭圆方程变分问题的非孤立约束极小值点；n-孤子解在H^{n/2}空间中动态稳定；双孤子解在H^1空间中轨道稳定
AI.significance: 为完全可积系统的孤子稳定性提供了新的理论框架，将变分方法与逆散射技术结合，深化了对非线性波方程稳定性的理解

title: Improved Local Well-Posedness in Sobolev Spaces for Two-Dimensional Compressible Euler Equations
summary:
We establish the local existence and uniqueness of solutions to the two-dimensional compressible Euler equations with initial velocity $\bv_0$, logarithmic density $ρ_0$, and specific vorticity \(w_0\), which satisfy $(\bv_0, ρ_0, w_0, \nabla w_0)\in H^{\frac74+}(\mathbb{R}^2)\times H^{\frac74+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{\frac32}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times L^{8}(\mathbb{R}^2)$.
  The proof applies Smith-Tataru method \cite{ST} and the inherent wave-transport structure of the two-dimensional compressible Euler equations. The key observation is that Strichartz estimates hold when the regularity requirement for vorticity is lower than that for velocity and density, even though the gradient of vorticity appears as a source term in the velocity wave equation. Furthermore, our result presents an improvement of $\frac{1}{4}$-order regularity compared to previous results \cite{Z1} and \cite{Z2}.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维可压缩欧拉方程在较低正则性初值条件下的局部存在唯一性，比先前结果改进了1/4阶正则性
AI.motivation: 研究二维可压缩欧拉方程在较低正则性初值条件下的适定性问题，特别是当涡度梯度作为速度波方程源项时的处理
AI.techniques: 应用Smith-Tataru方法，利用二维可压缩欧拉方程的波-输运结构，建立Strichartz估计，处理涡度梯度作为源项的问题
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当初值满足$(v_0, ρ_0, w_0, ∇w_0)∈H^{7/4+}×H^{7/4+}×H^{3/2}×L^8$时，二维可压缩欧拉方程存在局部唯一解
AI.significance: 将二维可压缩欧拉方程的存在唯一性结果改进了1/4阶正则性，为处理涡度梯度作为波方程源项提供了新方法

title: Global Weak Solutions for the High--Friction Quantum Navier--Stokes--Poisson Model
summary:
In [1], the Authors rigorously establish the relaxation limit from the Quantum Navier Stokes Poisson (QNSP) system to the Quantum Drift Diffusion (QDD) equation, while providing only a brief outline of the global existence theory for weak solutions to QNSP in the high friction regime (see Appendix A therein). In this manuscript, we present a complete and fully self contained proof of global existence.
  More precisely, we prove the global existence of finite energy weak solutions to the QNSP system with high friction and large initial data on the three-dimensional torus. The model describes a compressible, viscous quantum fluid with Korteweg type capillarity effects, and allows for degenerate viscosity and vacuum regions.
  The construction proceeds in two main steps. First, it is introduced a Faedo Galerkin approximation endowed with suitable damping mechanisms, which yields smooth approximate solutions through compactness arguments. Then, it will be justify the convergence of the approximating sequence by combining a truncation of the momentum equation with DiPerna Lions commutator estimates, providing the required control over the nonlinear transport structure.

AI.tldr: 本文完整证明了三维环面上具有高摩擦和大初值的量子Navier-Stokes-Poisson系统的全局弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 先前文献[1]在从量子Navier-Stokes-Poisson系统到量子漂移扩散方程的松弛极限研究中，仅简要概述了高摩擦情形下弱解的全局存在性理论。本文旨在提供完整、自包含的全局存在性证明。
AI.techniques: 采用Faedo-Galerkin逼近方法，结合适当的阻尼机制；通过紧性论证获得光滑近似解；结合动量方程的截断技术与DiPerna-Lions交换子估计来控制非线性输运结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三维环面上具有高摩擦和大初值的量子Navier-Stokes-Poisson系统有限能量弱解的全局存在性，该模型描述具有Korteweg型毛细效应、允许退化粘性和真空区域的压缩粘性量子流体
AI.significance: 完善了量子流体力学中重要模型的数学理论基础，为后续研究松弛极限等分析提供了坚实的数学基础，对量子流体动力学和半导体物理中的数学模型研究具有重要意义

title: A constant rank theorem for linear elliptic equations on the sphere with applications to the mixed Christoffel problem
summary: We study the mixed Christoffel problem for $C^{2,+}$ convex bodies providing sufficient conditions for its solution. Key to our approach is a constant rank theorem, following the approach developed in \cite{Guan-Ma-2003} to address the Christoffel problem, in order to ensure that the solution to a related second order linear PDE on the sphere is indeed geometric, that is, it is the support functions of a $C^{2,+}$ convex body.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了混合Christoffel问题，为C^{2,+}凸体提供了该问题解存在的充分条件。
AI.motivation: Christoffel问题是凸几何中的经典问题，涉及从给定的曲率信息重构凸体。混合Christoffel问题推广了这一经典问题，研究更一般的曲率组合条件。本文旨在为这类问题建立解存在的充分条件。
AI.techniques: 主要采用常秩定理技术，借鉴Guan-Ma-2003的方法来处理Christoffel问题，通过分析球面上的二阶线性偏微分方程来确保解的几何性质。
AI.main_theorems: 为混合Christoffel问题建立了充分条件，证明在适当条件下相关二阶线性PDE的解确实是C^{2,+}凸体的支撑函数。
AI.significance: 扩展了经典Christoffel问题的理论框架，为混合曲率问题提供了新的分析工具，在凸几何和偏微分方程交叉领域有重要意义。

title: Exponential blow-up of mild solutions to the fractional Boussinesq equations in the Gevrey class
summary: This work establishes conditions for the existence and uniqueness of local mild solutions to the Boussinesq equations with fractional dissipations in Sobolev-Gevrey spaces. We prove that a unique mild solution exists in an appropriate Sobolev-Gevrey class and analyze its behavior up to the maximal time of existence. In particular, we derive quantitative lower bounds describing how the norm of the solution must blow up as it approaches a finite maximal time. As a corollary, we deduce that the solution exhibits exponential growth.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数耗散Boussinesq方程在Sobolev-Gevrey空间中局部温和解的存在唯一性条件
AI.motivation: 研究分数耗散Boussinesq方程在Sobolev-Gevrey空间中的适定性问题，这类方程在流体力学中描述热对流现象，分数耗散项提供了更一般的耗散模型
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev-Gevrey空间框架，分析局部温和解的存在唯一性，推导解在最大存在时间附近的爆破下界估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了分数耗散Boussinesq方程在适当Sobolev-Gevrey类中存在唯一局部温和解，给出了解在有限最大存在时间附近的定量爆破下界，推论出解呈现指数增长
AI.significance: 扩展了Boussinesq方程在分数耗散情形下的适定性理论，提供了更精细的空间框架（Sobolev-Gevrey空间），为研究解的长时间行为提供了新工具

title: Norm Inflation For The Critical SQG Equation
summary: We consider the critical dissipative surface quasi-geostrophic (SQG) equation on $\mathbb{R}^2$ or $\mathbb{T}^2$. Despite global regularity of the equation, we show that the data-to-solution map at the critical level $H^1$ is not uniformly bounded. We construct solutions that experience $H^1$ norm inflation from smooth, compactly supported initial data with large $H^1$ norm. We also demonstrate small-data norm inflation in supercritical Sobolev spaces $W^{β,p}$ for $1<p<2$ and $1\leβ<\tfrac{2}{p}$.

AI.tldr: 证明了临界耗散表面准地转方程在临界空间H¹上的解映射不是一致有界的，构造了从光滑紧支初值出发的H¹范数膨胀解
AI.motivation: 研究临界耗散表面准地转(SQG)方程在临界空间H¹上的适定性问题。尽管该方程具有全局正则性，但作者关注解映射在临界空间的一致有界性问题，这是研究偏微分方程适定性理论的重要方向。
AI.techniques: 构造特殊解的方法，通过构造从光滑紧支初值出发的H¹范数膨胀解，证明解映射不是一致有界的；在超临界Sobolev空间中使用小数据范数膨胀技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 临界耗散SQG方程在临界空间H¹上的解映射不是一致有界的；2. 构造了从光滑紧支初值出发的H¹范数膨胀解；3. 在超临界Sobolev空间W^{β,p} (1<p<2, 1≤β<2/p)中证明了小数据范数膨胀现象
AI.significance: 揭示了临界耗散SQG方程在临界空间适定性理论的微妙性质，尽管方程具有全局正则性，但解映射在临界空间不是一致有界的，这对理解临界耗散方程的解映射性质有重要意义，为研究其他临界耗散方程提供了新的视角和方法

title: Orbital stability of kinks in the NLS equation with competing nonlinearities
summary: Kinks connecting zero and nonzero equilibria in the NLS equation with competing nonlinearities occur at the special values of the frequency parameter. Since they are minimizers of energy, they are expected to be orbitally stable in the time evolution of the NLS equation. However, the stability proof is complicated by the degeneracy of kinks near the nonzero equilibrium. The main purpose of this work is to give a rigorous proof of the orbital stability of kinks. We give details of analysis for the cubic--quintic NLS equation and show how the proof is extended to the general case.

AI.tldr: 严格证明了连接零与非零平衡点的扭结解在具有竞争非线性的NLS方程中的轨道稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有竞争非线性的NLS方程中连接零与非零平衡点的扭结解，这些解出现在频率参数的特殊值处，作为能量最小化子，预期在NLS方程的时间演化中具有轨道稳定性，但稳定性证明因扭结解在非零平衡点附近的退化性而变得复杂
AI.techniques: 使用能量最小化方法，处理扭结解在非零平衡点附近的退化性，分析框架包括Lyapunov函数构造和谱分析，详细处理三次-五次NLS方程并推广到一般情况
AI.main_theorems: 证明了扭结解在具有竞争非线性的NLS方程中的轨道稳定性，给出了三次-五次NLS方程的详细分析，并展示了如何将证明推广到一般情况
AI.significance: 解决了具有竞争非线性的NLS方程中扭结解稳定性这一长期存在的理论问题，为理解非线性波动力学中的拓扑缺陷稳定性提供了严格数学基础，方法可推广到其他具有竞争非线性的系统

title: The Maxwell equations on full sub-extremal and extremal Kerr spacetimes
summary:
We study the Cauchy problem for the Maxwell equations in the exterior region of Kerr black hole spacetimes. The equations are formulated for components of the Maxwell field relative to the algebraically special frame of Kerr, with the unknowns treated as tensorial quantities associated with a non-integrable horizontal distribution. The extremal Maxwell components decouple into Teukolsky equations, whereas the middle Maxwell components form a coupled system of transport and elliptic equations. Assuming control over the extremal components, we prove uniform boundedness (without loss of derivatives) and decay estimates for the middle components in the full |a|<=M range of spacetime parameters. Our analysis relies on (i) deriving a decoupled system of transport and elliptic equations for two modified middle Maxwell components and (ii) decomposing general solutions into a dynamical and stationary part, the latter determined by two real (electric and magnetic) charges which are entirely read off from the initial data at the event horizon.
  In the sub-extremal |a|<M case, works of Shlapentokh-Rothman and the second author provide the necessary control over the extremal components, yielding unconditional boundedness and decay results for all the unknowns in the equations.
  In the extremal |a|=M case, we formulate a conjectural boundedness and decay statement for the extremal components, motivated by work of Casals, Gralla and Zimmerman on fixed azimuthal mode solutions compactly supported away from the event horizon. Our boundedness and decay results for all the unknowns in the equations remain, therefore, conditional. We show that the complicated dynamics of the extremal components at the event horizon is inherited by the middle components; in particular, we uncover novel conservation laws for the middle components of axisymmetric solutions.

AI.tldr: 在Kerr黑洞时空中研究Maxwell方程柯西问题，建立了中间Maxwell分量的有界性和衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究Kerr黑洞时空外部区域中Maxwell方程的柯西问题，这是广义相对论中电磁场在旋转黑洞背景下的演化问题，对于理解黑洞物理和引力波物理具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用Kerr时空的代数特殊标架，将Maxwell分量分解为极值分量和中间分量；推导解耦的输运和椭圆方程系统；将解分解为动力学部分和稳态部分；利用电荷守恒定律
AI.main_theorems: 在控制极值分量的前提下，证明了中间分量的均匀有界性（无导数损失）和衰减估计；在亚极值情况下获得无条件结果；在极值情况下获得条件性结果；发现了轴对称解的守恒定律
AI.significance: 这是Kerr时空中Maxwell方程研究的重大进展，为黑洞扰动理论提供了新工具，揭示了极值黑洞的复杂动力学行为，对引力波物理和黑洞稳定性研究有重要应用

title: On a cross-diffusion hybrid model: Cancer Invasion Tissue with Normal Cell Involved
summary: In this paper, we study a well-posedness problem on a new mathematical model for cancer invasion within the plasminogen activation system, which explicitly incorporates cooperation with host normal cells. Key biological mechanisms--including chemotaxis, haptotaxis, recruitment, logistic growth, and natural degradation of normal cells--along with other primary components (cancer cells, vitronectin, uPA, uPAI-1 and plasmin) are modeled via a continuum framework of cancer cell invasion of the extracellular matrix. The resulting model constitutes a strongly coupled, cross-diffusion hybrid system of differential equations. The primary mathematical challenges arise from the strongly coupled cross-diffusion terms, the parabolic operators of divergence form, and the interaction between the cross-diffusion fluxes and the ODE components. We address these by deriving several a priori estimates for dimensions d less or equal to 3. Subsequently, we employ a decoupling strategy to split the system into proper sub-problems, establishing the existence (and uniqueness) for each subsystem. Finally, we demonstrate the global existence and uniqueness of the solution for dimensions d less or equal to 2 and the global existence of a solution for dimension d = 3.

AI.tldr: 建立了癌症侵袭模型中考虑宿主正常细胞合作的强耦合交叉扩散系统的适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究纤溶酶原激活系统中癌症侵袭的新数学模型，该模型明确考虑了与宿主正常细胞的合作，包含趋化、趋触、招募、逻辑增长等关键生物机制
AI.techniques: 推导先验估计、解耦策略将系统分解为子问题、处理强耦合交叉扩散项和散度形式抛物算子
AI.main_theorems: 对于d≤2维证明了全局解的存在唯一性，对于d=3维证明了全局解的存在性
AI.significance: 为包含宿主正常细胞合作的癌症侵袭模型建立了严格的数学基础，扩展了交叉扩散系统理论在生物数学中的应用
